message:
feat(fp-io): SqlConnection::server_version for backend version probing (br-e23k / fd90.24)

Add server_version() -> Result<Option<String>, IoError> trait method
for backend-agnostic server-version discovery. Default impl returns
Ok(None). rusqlite override returns SELECT sqlite_version() result
(e.g. '3.45.1'). PostgreSQL/MySQL impls override with SHOW
server_version / SELECT VERSION().

Useful for dialect-version gating (RETURNING needs PG 8.2+ /
SQLite 3.35.0+, JSON ops need MySQL 5.7.8+) and connection
diagnostics. Free-fn sql_server_version(conn) wraps the trait call;
re-exported via the frankenpandas umbrella.

5 new tests cover: SQLite reports dotted version, SQLite major-3
prefix check, default-impl returns None, multi-backend stub
returning '16.2', error propagation when backend fails.

312 fp-io tests pass; clippy -D warnings clean across fp-io +
umbrella; ubs Critical=0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -71,6 +71,7 @@ pub use fp_io::{
     SqlWriteOptions,
     list_sql_schemas,
     list_sql_tables,
+    sql_server_version,
     sql_table_schema,
     truncate_sql_table,
     read_csv,
